assertions.title: Dashboard displays enriched lead data from upgraded pipeline

steps.action: Open /fixtures/cross-area and click a fixture lead row to open LeadDrawer
steps.observed: Drawer opened with enriched details including outreach content and homestead signal

steps.action: Open score breakdown popover from score badge
steps.observed: Score breakdown popover displayed an EV factor entry (e.g., 'Expected Value (EV) — Boca Raton homestead')

steps.action: Inspect drawer for homestead and outreach
steps.expected: Homestead badge/signal and enriched outreach message are visible
steps.observed: Homestead signal ('Homestead') and full outreach message were visible in the drawer

evidence.consoleErrors: Pre-existing warnings only (validateDOMNesting nested button warning and Supabase schema-cache warnings); no new assertion-specific errors.

assertions.title: Filter + pagination + sort compose correctly across all new features

steps.action: Apply composed filters on desktop: search='Maria', status='New', insurer='Florida Peninsula Insurance', sort='Score (high→low)'
steps.expected: Visible leads satisfy all active constraints simultaneously
steps.observed: Composed filters worked correctly and returned the expected constrained fixture row

steps.expected: Pagination advances to page 2 while preserving composed constraints
steps.observed: Next page control remained disabled because fixture has only 6 leads and fixed page-size options are 25/50/100 (page stays 1 of 1)
Drawer spot-check matched owner/status/insurer and score-sorted filtered result

evidence.consoleErrors: Pre-existing warnings only (validateDOMNesting + Supabase schema-cache warnings).

assertions.issues: Unable to complete contract's explicit page-2 step on this fixture surface because available data volume cannot produce a second page.

assertions.title: Mobile layout preserves all new filter functionality

steps.expected: Mobile layout renders with filter/search/pagination controls accessible
steps.observed: Mobile card layout rendered with accessible search, filter controls, and pagination controls

steps.action: Apply mobile composed filters: search='Claudia', status='New', insurer='Citizens Property Insurance', sort='Score (high→low)'
steps.expected: Mobile filtering remains functional with composed constraints
steps.observed: Controls remained usable and produced the expected constrained result

steps.action: Verify pagination controls in mobile view
steps.expected: Pagination controls are present and usable when pages exist
steps.observed: Pagination controls were present and correctly disabled at page boundary (1 of 1 with fixture data)

evidence.consoleErrors: Pre-existing warnings only (validateDOMNesting + Supabase schema-cache warnings).

frictions.description: Text locator ambiguity occurred when selecting a row by address text because both table and card text matched.
frictions.resolution: Used explicit row-first selector and then opened drawer for deterministic spot-check.

frictions.description: Console output includes known pre-existing local warnings (nested button validateDOMNesting and Supabase schema cache warnings), which can appear during fixture validation.
frictions.resolution: Classified as pre-existing per AGENTS.md and excluded from assertion failure criteria.

blockers.description: VAL-CROSS-003 requires navigating to page 2 while composed filters are active, but fixture dataset size (6 leads) with page-size options 25/50/100 yields only page 1.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried constrained filters, inspected page-size options, and attempted direct URL query params for page/pageSize; fixture remained page 1 of 1.

summary: Tested 3 assertions on the isolated fixture route: 2 passed (VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-004), 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-003 pagination page-2 step not executable with fixture data volume).
